originalBehavior: The published Recipes chapter boots the Learning Synths shell and exposes a fuller subtractive-synth panel with multiple controls and preset-style text guidance.
localStatus: The local route keeps that chapter shell and subtractive-synth runtime under the route tree while moving provenance to the shared footer.
notes: The archive preserves the published Recipes chapter instead of recasting it as a single custom synth widget.
Local chapter links are rewritten after mount so the shipped synth family stays internally navigable.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies local script loading and the Recipes playback and slider paths on the shipped route.
The public route keeps footer-only provenance and strips the upstream lesson shell from the body.

originalBehavior: The published chapter relies on shared Learning Synths fonts, text payloads, RNBO patch data, and lesson WAV files around the subtractive-synth panels.
localStatus: The local route archives that shared inventory under its own tree so the Recipes chapter can run without remote media dependencies.
notes: The archived inventory matches the rest of the shipped Learning Synths batch.
Route-local assets stay on relative paths for GitHub Pages subpath hosting.
evidence: Music smoke coverage asserts the expected local asset counts before the Recipes interaction checks begin.
The no-remote-playable-media smoke guard stays clean after lesson boot and interaction.

originalBehavior: The published Recipes chapter lets users start playback and move synth controls while the subtractive-synth panels stay synchronized.
localStatus: The local route keeps the playback toggle and slider-driven panel updates while serving the chapter entirely from archived assets.
notes: The Recipes chapter is treated as the synthesis batch payoff because it combines several control families into one sustained scene.
The route keeps the published chapter structure instead of flattening the panels into an auto-generated catalog card.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies a recipe slider update and the play button’s active state on the shipped route.
Responsive checks keep the Recipes chapter usable on narrow viewports under the local archive shell.
